prompt: A 3D render of a winding mountain road viewed from a slightly elevated perspective. Guardrails run along the right foreground, the road curves into the midground where a red sedan is driving, and pine trees line both sides fading into the far background. Rendered with realistic lighting and atmospheric perspective.
prompt_refined: A high-quality 3D render of a winding mountain road, viewed from a slightly elevated perspective. In the immediate right foreground, prominent guardrails stretch alongside the road. The asphalt road itself curves into the midground, where a red sedan is actively driving. Dense pine trees line both sides of the road, gradually receding into the far background with a strong sense of atmospheric perspective. The entire scene is illuminated with realistic, natural lighting.
objects: Dense pine trees lining both sides of the road
